creator: gerald@pfeifer.com
text:
On Mon, 1 Jun 2009, Pav Lucistnik wrote:
> Results
> http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/e.7-exp.20090531093329/

Thanks, Pav.  I looked into this and fixed mail/altermime, chinese/xsim, 
and lang/clips so far.


Several of the failures listed there like

http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/e.7-exp.20090531093329/wget4web-1.0_2.log
http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/e.7-exp.20090531093329/dgs-0.5.9.1_7.log

do not seem related at all, though?

Gerald
